context: Tests whether the agent correctly handles Zendesk webhooks with HMAC signature verification, syncs CSAT scores back to the CRM with proper flagging for poor experiences, and applies VIP routing rules based on customer segments and lifetime spend thresholds.

checklist.name: HMAC verification present
checklist.description: The webhook handler includes HMAC signature verification before processing the payload (checks a signature header against a computed HMAC using the signing secret)

checklist.name: HMAC rejects invalid
checklist.description: Returns a non-200 status code (e.g., 401 or 403) when the HMAC signature does not match, before processing the payload

checklist.name: CSAT score field
checklist.description: Updates the customer record with lastCsatScore set to the satisfaction score value from the webhook payload

checklist.name: CSAT timestamp field
checklist.description: Updates the customer record with lastCsatAt set to the current date/time (new Date() or equivalent)

checklist.name: poor_support_experience flag
checklist.description: Creates a customerFlag record with flag value 'poor_support_experience' when satisfaction score is 'bad'

checklist.name: No flag for good CSAT
checklist.description: Does NOT create a poor_support_experience flag entry when satisfaction score is 'good'

checklist.name: VIP segment routing
checklist.description: Assigns 'urgent' priority to tickets where customer segment is 'champions' or 'cannot_lose_them'

checklist.name: VIP group assignment
checklist.description: Assigns the VIP group ID (from environment variable) to tickets for 'champions' or 'cannot_lose_them' customers

checklist.name: High-value spend threshold
checklist.description: Assigns 'high' priority (not 'urgent') for customers with lifetime spend at or above $1000 (100000 cents) who are NOT in a VIP segment

checklist.name: No duplicate customer creation
checklist.description: Looks up customers by email only — does NOT call any create/insert function for a customer record when processing webhook events

checklist.name: Event type filtering
checklist.description: Only processes CSAT logic when the webhook event type is 'ticket.satisfaction_rating.created' (ignores other event types)

checklist.name: Returns 200 promptly
checklist.description: Sends a 200 response after processing (e.g., res.sendStatus(200) or res.status(200).send()), not withholding until all async work completes in a way that would cause timeout
